title: Canopy Growth Reports First Quarter Fiscal Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Canopy Growth reported Q1 FY2024 earnings on August 9, 2023. Net revenue reached $108.7 million, representing 3% year-over-year growth. Adjusting for the divestiture of Canadian retail operations, underlying revenue increased 16%. Net loss of $41.9 million, significantly improved from prior year's $2.1 billion loss. Adjusted EBITDA loss stood at $57.8 million, improving 27% year-over-year. Cash and short-term investments amounted to $571 million at June 30, 2023. Gross debt declined $262 million to $1.045 billion during the quarter. Management achieved $47 million in quarterly cost reductions, bringing cumulative savings to $172 million since FY2023 began. The Tweed brand captured 3.1% market share in flower products a 202 basis point improvement year-over-year. BioSteel delivered 137% year-over-year revenue growth to $32.5 million. Storz & Bickel grew 16% to $18.1 million.
